sys_update_set.description: Claude Cap Increase Catalog Item with dynamic tier dropdowns and VP escalation approval flow. Max cap $300. Supports Claude (Tier 1/2/3) and Claude Code (A1/A2/A3).
sys_update_set.name: Claude Cap Increase - Catalog and Approval Flow
sys_update_set.sys_name: Claude Cap Increase - Catalog and Approval Flow

sc_category.description: Requests related to Claude AI application management, cap increases, and tier upgrades.
sc_category.full_description: Submit requests to manage your Claude or Claude Code application entitlements. This includes cap increase requests up to the $300 maximum limit.
sc_category.title: Claude App Management

sc_cat_item.description:
Use this form to request an increase to your Claude or Claude Code application cap.

  • The current maximum cap for the Claude app is $300.
  • Select your Type of Request (Claude or Claude Code).
  • Select the appropriate tier for your request.
  • Your request will be routed to your VP approver via your manager chain.

Once approved by a VP, your RITM will be updated accordingly.
sc_cat_item.fulfillment_instructions: Route this RITM through the Claude Cap Increase Approval Flow. The flow will walk the requested-for user's manager chain to find a VP and send the approval request to that VP.
sc_cat_item.mobile_subtitle: Request a tier upgrade for Claude or Claude Code - VP approval required
sc_cat_item.name: Claude Cap Increase Request
sc_cat_item.short_description: Request a cap increase for your Claude or Claude Code application (max $300)

item_option_new.description: Select whether this request is for Claude or Claude Code.
item_option_new.help_text: Choose Claude for the standard Claude app, or Claude Code for the coding-focused variant.
item_option_new.name: type_of_request

item_option_new.description: Select the tier level for your Claude application request.
item_option_new.help_text: Tier 1 is the entry-level, Tier 2 is mid-level, and Tier 3 is the highest usage tier for Claude.
item_option_new.name: claude_tier

item_option_new.description: Select the tier level for your Claude Code application request.
item_option_new.help_text: A1 is entry-level, A2 is mid-level, and A3 is the highest usage tier for Claude Code.
item_option_new.name: claude_code_tier

catalog_ui_policy.short_description: Show Claude Tier dropdown when Type of Request is Claude
catalog_ui_policy.sys_name: Claude Cap Increase Request - Show Claude Tier

catalog_ui_policy_action.sys_name: Claude Cap Increase Request - Show Claude Tier - claude_tier

ui_policy.display_value: Show Claude Tier dropdown when Type of Request is Claude

catalog_ui_policy_action.sys_name: Claude Cap Increase Request - Show Claude Tier - claude_code_tier

ui_policy.display_value: Show Claude Tier dropdown when Type of Request is Claude

catalog_ui_policy.short_description: Show Claude Code Tier dropdown when Type of Request is Claude Code
catalog_ui_policy.sys_name: Claude Cap Increase Request - Show Claude Code Tier

catalog_ui_policy_action.sys_name: Claude Cap Increase Request - Show Claude Code Tier - claude_code_tier

ui_policy.display_value: Show Claude Code Tier dropdown when Type of Request is Claude Code

catalog_ui_policy_action.sys_name: Claude Cap Increase Request - Show Claude Code Tier - claude_tier

ui_policy.display_value: Show Claude Code Tier dropdown when Type of Request is Claude Code

sys_script_include.description: Helper utility for the Claude Cap Increase Approval Flow. Walks the manager chain to find a VP approver and updates the RITM on approval or rejection.
sys_script_include.name: ClaudeCapIncreaseHelper

sys_hub_flow.description: Handles approval routing for Claude Cap Increase Requests. Walks the requested-for user's manager chain to find a VP and sends the approval request to that VP. Updates the RITM on approval or rejection.
sys_hub_flow.label: Claude Cap Increase Approval Flow
sys_hub_flow.name: claude_cap_increase_approval_flow

sys_hub_step.annotation: Retrieve catalog variables (type_of_request, claude_tier, claude_code_tier) from the triggered RITM so they can be used in subsequent steps.
sys_hub_step.label: Get Catalog Variables from RITM
sys_hub_step.name: get_catalog_variables
sys_hub_step.sys_name: Claude Cap Increase Approval Flow - Get Catalog Variables from RITM

sys_hub_step.annotation: Walk the requested-for user's manager chain upward until a manager with VP in their title is found. That VP's sys_id is stored as the approver for the next step.

input.name: script

sys_hub_step.label: Find VP Approver (Walk Manager Chain)
sys_hub_step.name: find_vp_approver
sys_hub_step.sys_name: Claude Cap Increase Approval Flow - Find VP Approver

sys_hub_step.annotation: Send the approval request to the identified VP. The VP must provide mandatory comments. The flow waits here until the VP approves or rejects.

input.name: approval_field
input.value: Approve Claude Cap Increase Request for {{trigger.request_item.requested_for.name}} - Type: {{steps.get_catalog_variables.type_of_request}}

sys_hub_step.label: VP Approval - Claude Cap Increase
sys_hub_step.name: vp_approval
sys_hub_step.sys_name: Claude Cap Increase Approval Flow - VP Approval

sys_hub_step.annotation: Check whether the VP approved or rejected the request and route to the appropriate update script.
sys_hub_step.label: Check Approval Decision
sys_hub_step.name: check_approval_decision
sys_hub_step.sys_name: Claude Cap Increase Approval Flow - Check Approval Decision

sys_hub_step.annotation: VP approved the request. Call ClaudeCapIncreaseHelper.updateRITMOnApproval() to set RITM state to Closed Complete, update work_notes, and record approval details.

input.name: script

sys_hub_step.label: Update RITM - Approved
sys_hub_step.name: update_ritm_approved
sys_hub_step.sys_name: Claude Cap Increase Approval Flow - Update RITM Approved

sys_hub_step.annotation: VP rejected the request. Call ClaudeCapIncreaseHelper.updateRITMOnRejection() to set RITM state to Closed Incomplete and record rejection details.

input.name: script

sys_hub_step.label: Update RITM - Rejected
sys_hub_step.name: update_ritm_rejected
sys_hub_step.sys_name: Claude Cap Increase Approval Flow - Update RITM Rejected
